zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Legh於1442年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾巴頓時，他的父親John Leigh2歲，母親Emma Grosvenor10歲。他於大約1462年與Lady Ellen Anne Alice Booth在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1546年享年104歲。

nameMeanings.name: Legh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Leigh
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places (in at least sixteen counties, but especially Leigh in Lancashire) named either with the nominative case of Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’ (see Lee ) or with lēage, a late dative form of this word (see Lye ).
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 李, based on its Cantonese pronunciation. See   Li   1.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Legh was born in 1442, in Barton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Leigh, was 2 and his mother, Emma Grosvenor, was 10. He married Lady Ellen Anne Alice Booth about 1462, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1546, at the age of 104.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Legh(이)가 1442년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 바턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Leigh(은)는 2세였고, 그의 어머니 Emma Grosvenor(은)는 10세였다. 그는 대략 1462년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Lady Ellen Anne Alice Booth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1546년 104세의 나이로 사망했다.
